issues.title: Inconsistent Logging Practices
issues.description: Discovery service lacks structured logging throughout the codebase
issues.root_cause: Logging was added to v3 server but discovery_service.py was not updated
issues.impact: Difficult to debug production issues, no audit trail
issues.recommendation: Add logging module to discovery_service.py

issues.title: Duplicate Function Names Across Modules
issues.description: Functions like security_scan, repo_recon exist in multiple locations
issues.impact: Import confusion, potential wrong function invocation
issues.recommendation: Implement module-scoped naming or prefix conventions

issues.title: Missing Type Hints
issues.description: Functions lack type annotations for parameters and return values
issues.root_cause: Rapid prototyping phase, no enforced type checking
issues.impact: Reduced IDE support, potential runtime errors
issues.recommendation: Add type hints incrementally, enforce via mypy

issues.title: Monolithic Server Implementation
issues.description: Enhanced MCP server v3 contains 2500+ lines in single file with multiple responsibilities
issues.impact: Difficult to maintain, test, and extend; violates Single Responsibility Principle
issues.recommendation: Split into modules: config, telemetry, skill_manager, ml_models, resource_optimizer

issues.title: Circular Dependency Risk in Core Modules
issues.description: Module imports suggest tight coupling between skill management and telemetry
issues.root_cause: Early design decisions, Mock objects used to break dependencies
issues.impact: Import errors, difficult to test in isolation
issues.recommendation: Use dependency injection, create interfaces/abstractions

issues.title: Route Order Conflict Risk
issues.description: FastAPI routes may conflict if specific routes aren't defined before generic routes
issues.root_cause: Past experience documented but not enforced via tests
issues.impact: Route mismatch errors, unexpected 404s
issues.recommendation: Add integration tests verifying all routes work correctly

issues.title: Minimal Test Coverage
issues.description: Only 11 test files for 446 Python source files (~2.5% ratio)
issues.root_cause: No CI/CD pipeline, no test requirements
issues.impact: High risk of regressions, fear of making changes
issues.recommendation: Implement pytest with 70% coverage target

issues.title: Test File Import Errors
issues.description: Test imports enhanced_mcp_server_v3 module that doesn't exist at root level
issues.root_cause: Wrong import path, no test discovery verification
issues.impact: Tests cannot run
issues.recommendation: Change import to from src.server.enhanced_mcp_server_v3 import ...

issues.title: No Integration/E2E Tests
issues.description: No tests for API endpoints, database interactions, or docker orchestration
issues.impact: Cannot verify system behavior as a whole
issues.recommendation: Add FastAPI TestClient tests, docker-compose integration tests

issues.title: Hardcoded Secrets in Environment File
issues.description: Contains hardcoded test API keys and JWT secret in .env file
issues.impact: Security vulnerability if committed to version control
issues.recommendation: Remove .env from git tracking, add .env.example with placeholder values, add startup checks
issues.acceptance_criteria: No secrets in version control, runtime validation

issues.title: No Secrets Rotation Mechanism
issues.description: No mechanism to rotate API keys or JWT secrets
issues.impact: Compromised credentials remain valid indefinitely
issues.recommendation: Implement secrets manager integration (AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault)

issues.title: No Dependency Vulnerability Scanning
issues.description: No automated security scanning for dependencies
issues.impact: Unknown vulnerabilities in dependencies
issues.recommendation: Add safety or pip-audit to CI pipeline

issues.title: JWT Secret Weakness
issues.description: Test JWT secret is too simple for production
issues.impact: Insecure if used in production
issues.recommendation: Enforce minimum secret complexity in production mode

issues.title: Missing Architecture Diagrams
issues.description: No official architecture diagram showing container relationships
issues.impact: Onboarding difficulty, unclear system boundaries
issues.recommendation: Create C4 diagram (Context, Container, Component, Code)

issues.title: Incomplete CONTRIBUTING Guidelines
issues.description: Contributing guide exists in context-hub but not at root
issues.impact: Unclear contribution process for main codebase
issues.recommendation: Create unified CONTRIBUTING.md at root

issues.title: No Onboarding Documentation
issues.description: New developers lack step-by-step setup guide
issues.impact: Extended onboarding time
issues.recommendation: Create DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md with prerequisites, local setup, running tests, common tasks, troubleshooting

issues.title: Outdated Core Dependencies
issues.description: Some packages behind by major versions (numpy 1.26.4, pandas 2.2.2)
issues.impact: Missing security patches, performance improvements
issues.recommendation: Quarterly dependency audit, use pip list --outdated

issues.title: No Build Reproducibility
issues.description: Many packages use loose version constraints (>=)
issues.impact: Different environments may behave differently
issues.recommendation: Use pinned versions for production, include requirements-lock.txt

issues.title: No CI/CD Pipeline
issues.description: No GitHub Actions, no automated tests on PRs
issues.impact: No quality gates, potential for broken builds
issues.recommendation: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with Python linting, test execution, security scanning, Docker build verification

issues.title: No Docker Multi-Stage Build
issues.description: Dockerfile copies all files, no multi-stage for production
issues.impact: Larger image size, potential security issues
issues.recommendation: Implement multi-stage build (build -> production)

issues.title: Limited Structured Logging
issues.description: Skills don't log their operations consistently
issues.impact: Difficult to trace execution, debug issues
issues.recommendation: Add structured logging to skill base class

issues.title: No Distributed Tracing
issues.description: No request correlation across services
issues.impact: Cannot trace requests across containers
issues.recommendation: Add OpenTelemetry or similar

quality_gates.test_gate: New code requires tests (70% coverage target)
